steps.title: Identify the two clauses
steps.content: The text before the blank is a complete sentence about the Mission 66 initiative representing an investment in national parks. The text after the blank is another complete sentence about what the initiative prioritized.

steps.title: Use a semicolon between clauses
steps.content: A would need a comma before "and" to join two full clauses. B creates a run-on, and D creates a comma splice. A semicolon correctly joins the two independent clauses without a conjunction. The answer is C.
